paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 266 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 151 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 19 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 19 days past due with 58 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **41 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 16 days past due with 50 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **37 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $15,610 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 48 days past due with 49 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **21 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $37,783 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 19 days past due with 43 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **78 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $20,824 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 36 days past due with 31 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $35,924 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 20 days past due with 8 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **29 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $14,743 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $23,588 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** **17 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.
**Angel Pacheco:** Down to 3 overdue — making progress.

317 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **273 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 43 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$96,960 in payments going out this week** across 58 tasks — make sure funds are available. $111,410 expected in from 9 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Kyle Aubry - Project 01 — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 3. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 43 overdue (oldest: 19d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **78 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 93 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Clean — 1 tasks in progress. 2 payment tasks need Operations attention. **10 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 11 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** **17 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 3 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 3. Keep the momentum going.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 50 overdue (oldest: 16d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **37 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 37 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 49 overdue (oldest: 48d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **21 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 24 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 3 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 16. Keep the momentum going.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 58 overdue (oldest: 19d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **41 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 41 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** 31 overdue (oldest: 36d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 10 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 8 overdue (oldest: 20d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **29 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 41 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
